## Row {.flow}

```{r}
library(bslib)
library(htmltools)

link_card <- function(title, icon, href, color = "#0d6efd") {
  tags$a(
    href = href,
    target = "_blank",
    class = "text-decoration-none",
    style = "display: block;",
    tags$div(
      class = "text-center p-3",
      tags$i(class = paste0("bi bi-", icon), style = paste0("font-size: 2rem; color: ", color, ";")),
      tags$div(class = "mt-2 fw-bold text-dark", title)
    )
  )
}
```

::: {.card expandable="false" fill="false"}
```{r}
link_card("Dev Docs", "book", "https://arrow.apache.org/docs/developers/", "#0d6efd")
```
:::

::: {.card expandable="false" fill="false"}
```{r}
link_card("GitHub", "github", "https://github.com/apache/arrow", "#333")
```
:::

::: {.card expandable="false" fill="false"}
```{r}
link_card("Crossbow", "moon-stars", "https://crossbow.arrow-dev.org/", "#0dcaf0")
```
:::

::: {.card expandable="false" fill="false"}
```{r}
link_card("Conbench", "speedometer2", "https://conbench.arrow-dev.org/", "#ffc107")
```
:::

::: {.card expandable="false" fill="false"}
```{r}
link_card("Mailing List", "envelope", "https://lists.apache.org/list.html?dev@arrow.apache.org", "#6c757d")
```
:::

::: {.card expandable="false" fill="false"}
```{r}
link_card("Discussions", "chat-dots", "https://github.com/apache/arrow/discussions", "#198754")
```
:::
